question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Juan de Nova Island will be higher on 2026-03-22 than on 2026-03-15?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61970.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-15 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-03-06) was 30.025. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Juan de Nova Island.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - JUAN DE NOVA - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61970.D.
